overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking alongside a horse on a dirt path through open grassland. The character holds a lantern casting warm light on the ground while moonlight illuminates the landscape from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie wilderness trail under moonlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path while holding a lantern to illuminate the way, accompanied by a horse

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly alongside the character, matching pace on the trail

tall wild grass lining the left side of the path
tall wild grass lining the right side of the path
dark silhouettes of trees on the horizon against the night sky
large rock formations visible in the distance to the left
large rock formations visible in the distance to the right
bright full moon high in the night sky providing ambient light
small dilapidated wooden structure appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through open grassland at night, holding a lantern that casts a warm yellow glow on the ground. A horse walks calmly alongside, and the landscape is illuminated by bright moonlight with scattered clouds overhead. Rocky outcrops and distant trees frame the horizon, while a small wooden shack becomes visible on the left as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit dirt trail that gradually reveals a lonely structure amidst the open grassland. It begins with the character walking steadily through the night, holding a lantern that casts a warm yellow glow across the ground. As the camera moves forward, the horse walks calmly alongside under a bright moon and scattered clouds, with rocky outcrops and distant trees framing the horizon. The scene then shifts as the path continues, bringing a small wooden shack into view on the left.
